summary: The user discussed making a creamy sauce for dinner, recalling a recipe learned in a cooking class. They experimented with gluten-free spaghetti for their sister and sought advice on ingredients and types of creamy sauces, ultimately deciding to use heavy cream for their Italian pasta dish and adding sautéed mushrooms for flavor.
facts: The user learned a creamy sauce recipe in a cooking class a few weeks ago. The user tried the creamy sauce recipe at home last week, substituting pasta with gluten-free spaghetti for their sister who has gluten intolerance. The user is planning to make a creamy sauce for dinner tonight. The user decided to use heavy cream instead of half-and-half for their Italian pasta dish. The user is thinking of adding sautéed mushrooms to their Italian pasta dish.
